name: Devon Woodshop
address: The Oak Barn, Slapton Road, Totnes TQ9 5LS
description: Nestled in pristine ancient English oak woodlands, our Devon barn setup is a green woodworking dream containing traditional shavehorses and outdoor pole lathes.
seoTitle: Woodworking Classes Devon | Green Woodcarving Workshops Totnes
seoDescription: Discover wood spoon carving & axe workshops in Devon. Learn timber styling inside our beautiful traditional Totnes oak wood barn studio.

name: London Atelier
address: Unit 4B, Blackhorse Lane Industrial Studios, Walthamstow E17 5QJ
description: A high-precision climate-controlled space in East London equipped with professional Veritas hand planes, Lie-Nielsen bench chisels, and Japanese natural stones.
seoTitle: Woodworking & Cabinet Making Classes London | Learn Walthamstow
seoDescription: Join elite furniture making & cabinet repair studios in East London. Access professional tools, sharpen hand chisels, and practice woodturning.

name: Cornwall Coastal Forge & Barn
address: High Cliffs Crafts, Saint Erth, Hayle TR27 6JG
description: Our scenic Cornwall wooden guildhouse provides ocean-facing benches, perfect for sawing long structural softwood joint lines and practicing ancient Japanese framing.
seoTitle: Traditional Joinery Classes Cornwall | Creative Woodcraft Workshops
seoDescription: Build beautiful wood joint frames on the Cornwall coast. Try authentic pull sawing and joinery workshops guided by historic masters.
